exam_price_notes: $130 per exam. LOMA member discount available. Prerequisite: LOMA 280 (FLMI Part 1).

testing_centers.notes: Online proctored exam via LOMA's testing platform; requires webcam, microphone, and stable internet
Paper-based exams may be administered through employer arrangements; contact LOMA or employer HR for availability

id_requirements: One valid government-issued photo ID. Name must match LOMA registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials permitted during proctored exams. No personal items in testing area. Employer-sponsored paper-based testing arrangements may have different protocols.
renewal_options: Designations valid for 3 years with required CE hours. Renewal requires continuing education hours through LOMA-approved courses and professional development activities. Contact LOMA for specific CE requirements per designation. LOMA membership provides discounts on exam fees and study materials.

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period between exam attempts. Full exam fee required for each retake attempt.

official_study_resources.title: LOMA Education and Training Materials
official_study_resources.notes: Official textbooks, online courses, and study materials available from LOMA

aliases: flmi part 2 insurance company operations loma 290
